Hello everyone. We're going to go over some frequently asked questions for the SLEET multiplier product. So let's hop to it. The first question is how much should I take? Excellent question. I highly suggest that you take one serving, 90 minutes before bed. That should be all you need. Can you take an extra serving? Yes. Should you need an extra serving? Absolutely not. You can take this every day, no problem, 90 minutes before bed. When should I take it? Daily versus weekly. As I alluded to in the first question, you can take this product every day. No problem. Three, how should I take this product? With food or liquid? And you can take it with food or without food, no problem. Liquid, that's actually an interesting question and I would say that you take this product with as much liquid as you need to swallow the capsules. Because if you drink too much liquid then there's the actually the risk that you have to wake up in the middle of the night to pee. So for functionality's sake, you should only need a few gulps of fluid to swallow the pills. So this is as much liquid as you need. Fourth question, cycle it, stopping it, starting it. This product is perfectly safe. It is not habit forming and you can take it every day, 90 minutes before bed to help you go to sleep and stay asleep and it's totally natural. There's no need to stop it once you start it. What happens if you skip? That's perfectly fine. I do not suggest that you double up on your dose the next day. This is not a cumulative product in that way. If you do double up it will not hurt you. It will work more. But if you end up skipping a dose, no problem. Just hop right back on the wagon.
